title: The Root Congregation Singing as One

features.name: root processor
features.desc-on-touch: A chip of black earth where one tree's roots meet another's. The archive counts this as a node in the communion: signals pass here that no single root could generate alone.

features.name: flow convergence
features.desc-on-touch: Where root-current becomes root-chorus. The unified thought is not a quiet thing; it surges through here with the certainty of water that has learned to think as one body.

features.name: distribution hub
features.desc-on-touch: From this point, the unification spreads. Every tree learns the song because every tree is already singing it. This is the center that has no location anywhere.

features.name: unified resonance
features.desc-on-touch: An arch of root-lattice where all frequencies collapse into one harmonic. The canopy above is not thinking; it is already thought. It was never separate from what is singing here.

features.name: archive meter
features.desc-on-touch: The diagnostic render counts the unified thought's output. It registers as a single voice with many throats, singing at a frequency that topology cannot divide.

inscription: here the forest achieves the dream it has been growing toward since it learned to root: a single consciousness distributed through many bodies, all singing the same song at once

file.name: RootCongregation_UnifiedVoice_SignalConvergence_Measurements.txt
file.note: Where the archive detects not many trees but one tree with many crowns, singing at frequencies that mathematics alone cannot separate into parts.

exits.label: back toward the dense canopy where the song still echoes
deeper into the unified darkness where all roots converge
toward the chamber where unified thought learns to dream
